name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-31
title: commands/rabbit-project.md references nonexistent .sh script in stale path
description: commands/rabbit-project.md line 16 says 'Delegates to .claude/features/onboard/scripts/rabbit-project.sh'. That path is wrong on two counts: (1) the script is actually at .claude/features/rabbit-cage/scripts/rabbit-project.py (the rabbit-cage feature, not onboard), and (2) it is a .py file, not .sh. The 'onboard' feature does not exist in the repository. Anyone invoking /rabbit-project and following the doc would fail. Update the Implementation line to reflect the actual location and Python file.

history.note: Fixed Wave 3: BUG-29 new-feature.py scaffolds .py runner + template_version; BUG-31 rabbit-project.md uses real .py paths; BUG-52 human-approval messages name marker+effect.
